jobDescription:
I bring hands-on experience with microcontrollers, PCB design, and data communication protocols (UART, I2C, SPI), 
along with Python tooling for test automation. In my final-year project, I built an IoT water-quality monitor with
on-device filtering and a Firebase dashboard, improving sampling reliability by 23%. I’m comfortable with Agile
collaboration, quick prototyping, and writing clean docs, and I’m actively expanding my C/C++ and RTOS skills to 
contribute across firmware bring-up, debugging, and field testing.
eduThesis: Energy-Aware Scheduling for TinyML on Microcontrollers
Scalable Sensor Fusion for Edge Analytics
eduResearch:
- Published 1 IEEE workshop paper on TinyML scheduling
- Built low-power inference demos on Cortex-M4

- Implemented streaming ETL for multi-sensor time series
- Capstone: anomaly detection for pumps

- Final-year project: IoT water-quality monitor (pH, TDS, turbidity)
- Firebase dashboard + alerting

- Contributed to a lab demo on MQTT telemetry with Grafana

- Cut short-form content for TikTok/YouTube Shorts

pubTitle: Edge-friendly Signal Cleaning for Low-cost Water Sensors
